title: Skillet Chicken with Crispy Brazilian Breading
description: A flavorful and crispy chicken dish, seasoned with Brazilian spices and cooked to perfection in a skillet.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and Brazilian spice mix.
Cut the flaky pastry into small pieces and place them in a bowl.
Dip each chicken breast into the pastry pieces to coat evenly.
Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the coated chicken breast to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through.
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
